claim_boundary: Sequence/developability QC and VHH monomer structure predictions only; not PVRIG binding, affinity, docking, competition, or experimental blocking evidence.

formal_recovery_policy.reason_not_used: The frozen reconstruction rejects the eight preregistered L2 hard-fail candidates after forcing them into the TNP rerun complement; the eligible-only runner correctly retains them as hard failures without inventing TNP values.

hard_fail_semantics: A candidate with L1_numbering_integrity=FAIL or L2_vhh_features=FAIL remains in the 100-row summary, has no TNP result JSON, and is not converted into an eligible candidate by reconciliation.

igfold_policy.ad_hoc_completed_pdbs: validate and byte-freeze when ID, sequence FASTA, command exit, and CA coverage pass
igfold_policy.missing_pdbs: run direct IgFold prediction with one model on GPUs 0-3, then apply the same validation

nfs_policy: The frozen old NFS process identity guard must pass before supplementation, before publication, and immediately before terminal receipts. No SIGCONT and no NFS sync-back are allowed.
publication_policy: Capture each payload once, write a content-addressed immutable /data1 delivery, link SSD_DELIVERY_PUBLICATION.json last, revalidate, write the canonical recovery receipt with O_EXCL, then write the path-switch receipt with O_EXCL.
